metadata.blocker_not_removed: full all-materializable Foldseek aggregate remains incomplete until every query chunk completes and is aggregated
metadata.blocker_removed: replaces the single unresumable all-materializable Foldseek timeout with one completed deterministic query chunk against all staged materializable coordinates
blockers_remaining: all query chunks must complete and aggregate before a full all-materializable signal exists
one or more evaluated rows lacks a supported selected structure
query chunk covers only part of the all-materializable query set
review-only query-chunk TM-score signal is not a canonical full holdout claim
full_tm_score_holdout_claim_blockers: all query chunks must complete and aggregate before a full all-materializable signal exists
one or more evaluated rows lacks a supported selected structure
query chunk covers only part of the all-materializable query set
review-only query-chunk TM-score signal is not a canonical full holdout claim
limitations: full_tm_score_holdout_claim_permitted=false until chunk aggregation, coordinate exclusions, and canonical split policy are resolved
query chunk is resumable Foldseek evidence only; aggregate all chunks before evaluating a full all-materializable TM-score signal
review-only artifact; it creates no countable labels and no import-ready rows
selected rows with no supported coordinate structures remain excluded from TM-score computation
target coordinate coverage is all currently staged materializable coordinates, while query coverage is only this deterministic chunk
metadata.max_observed_train_test_tm_score_metric: max(qtmscore, ttmscore, alntmscore) across mapped heldout/in_distribution staged-coordinate pairs
metadata.tm_score_target_evaluation_scope: mapped heldout/in_distribution pairs from this query chunk against every staged materializable selected coordinate
